pkmn.lore: The storm of summer. Thunder rolls with its cry, and lightning strikes in time with its wings. The skies darken as it passes, and violent storms follow its soar.

slot2.lore: Formed within the depths of the earth, it moves through molten stone and scorched caverns, shaping volcanoes among the land through heat and pressure.
